data.summary: An enchanting 14-day journey through India's Golden Triangle and cultural hubs, offering a vibrant tapestry of majestic palaces, bustling bazaars, rich spirituality, and world-renowned culinary delights.

tips: Drink only sealed, bottled water and avoid ice cubes or raw salads to prevent illness.
Dress modestly in all public places, covering shoulders and knees. Carry a scarf for visiting temples and mosques.
Download ride-hailing apps like Uber or Ola to secure reliable, pre-priced transport in major cities.
Carry plenty of cash in small denominations (100 and 500 Rupee notes) as small vendors do not accept cards.
Always agree on a taxi or auto-rickshaw fare before boarding if they refuse to use a meter.
data.visaInfo: New Zealand passport holders must apply and pay for an e-Tourist Visa online at least 4 to 7 days before departure. Ensure your passport has at least 6 months validity and two blank pages.
data.bestTimeToVisit: October to March is the ideal time to visit, offering cooler, pleasant winter temperatures perfect for sightseeing across Delhi, Agra, and Rajasthan.
